programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a rundown cottage in Probus in Cornwall, a father buys a flat in Mitcham in Surrey as a long-term investment for his young daughter and a seasoned property developer buys a house in Tunstall in Stoke-on-Trent for her daughter.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion is in Plaistow in London looking around a three-bedroom semi, Lucy is checking out a small piece of land in Crayford in Kent, and Martin meets a father and son who have bought a small house with a big garden in Wheelock in Cheshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former miners cottage in Aberaman in South Wales and semis in Adderley Green in Stoke and Streatham in South London are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion look around auction buys in Birmingham, Oldham and Gravesend and discover what the new owners plan to do with their investments.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion travel the country meeting developers hoping to make some money from their auction buys. Today they are in Stoke, Croydon and Warrington hearing tales from the auction rooms.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former doctors surgery in need of TLC is converted into a family home in Houghton-le-spring and a flat in a 1930s block of flats in Edgware and a detached house in a woodland garden in Ashford in Kent are also given makeovers.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion looks round a large Victorian terrace in Plumstead, Martin is in Mickleover in Derby hearing a father and daughters plans for a flat and Lucy discovers what happened to a plot of land she saw five and a half years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Theres a family home in Consett in County Durham, a rental investment in Derby and an auction buy in Beckenham in London which will be used to run a new business.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a bungalow in a stunning setting in the Lake District while Dion has a look at a flat close to Nottingham city centre. Lucy meets a woman who mistakenly thought she was buying a piece of land in Folkestone in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy looks at a flat in Kilburn in London with one of the worst cases of damp she has ever seen, while Martin and Dion are in the Midlands looking round semis with potential.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat with huge potential in Londons Earlsfield, and terraced houses in Wombourne near Wolverhampton and Ynyswen near Treorchy in Wales are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is impressed with the potential of two shops and three flats in Tonypandy in Wales while Dion looks round a two-bedroom maisonette in Dawley and Lucy meets a first time developer with ambitious plans for an end terrace in Londons Forest Gate.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A first-floor one-bedroom flat in Londons Stepney Green, a three-bed semi in Dartford in Kent and a one-bedroom flat on the 17th floor of a block in Salford are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s bungalow in Dereham in Norfolk, a first-floor flat in Londons East Ham and a property in Maryport in Cumbria with a hidden room are all sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans for their investments.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a semi in Ilkeston in Derby, a flat in Streatham Hill in London and a bungalow in Somersets Portishead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a fifth-floor flat in Greater Manchester, a three bed semi in Carlisle and three commercial buildings near Stanstead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An old Derbyshire farmhouse in Wirksworth gets a stunning make over, a developer builds a pair of semis in Chatham in Kent while a mid-terraced house in Blackhall Colliery in County Durham is given a makeover ready for the rental market.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion meet father and daughter developers. An apartment in a former mill in Mow Cop on the Staffordshire /Cheshire borders, a three-bed semi in East Ham and a flat in Bournemouth are all given makeovers with the help of Dad.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 49-year-old performing arts teacher Helen is getting the party started. Flamboyant Helens cooking doesnt exactly go to plan but her dinner party is all about the entertainment and she certainly delivers on that.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the second day of the competition in Sheffield and the turn of design and technology teacher Claire to impress the guests with her Asian inspired menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day three in Sheffield and the turn of service administrator Monika to host. Shes hoping to win the prize by treating her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night, inspired by her homeland.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day four in Sheffield and 80s musician Ivors turn to host. After tensions rose between Claire and Helen at Bulgarian Monikas night, Ivors determined to put some fun into his evening with a live performance from his own band.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day in Sheffield and the turn of former chef Simon. Hes confident that his meal will be head and shoulders above the competition, but after all the criticism hes dished out this week, hes not going to get an easy ride.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Heather and Sally hope their fussy cleaning regime will impress their rivals at Brockley Hall Hotel in Yorkshire. But there are problems in some rooms, and the breakfast puzzles the guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alistair, who has fitted out luxury hotels including The Savoy, welcomes his rivals to his refurbished village pub, The Star Inn 1744, where his breakfast ordering system raises questions.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Michelle and Jason welcome their rivals to their luxury lodges at Croft Farm Park in Gloucestershire. The guests go canoeing but some struggle to stay afloat when someone sticks his oar in.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Tracy welcome their rivals to Harbour Vista in Poole, and most of their guests are surprised that its not more lavish.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Car S.O.S

programme.title: The Dog House Australia

programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz restore a 1991 VW Polo G40. While Fuzz restores its mechanical heart, Tims off to Germany to find out why VW made a supercharged Polo.

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Chillingham, Britains most haunted castle reveals its secrets. The owners at Iford Manor buy a pub. And Whitmore Hall has a spring clean.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Following Sister Jens nightshift, which kick-starts as a 35-year-old stabbing victim, Colin Richards, is rushed in by ambulance with injuries to his lung, arm and liver. Hes accompanied by his 19-year-old girlfriend, Esther, who was lying in bed next to him when they were awoken at gunpoint. While Esther cradles her boyfriend in Resus, Jen tends to Nancy Shirley, 86, who has spent her life alone and fell over at home.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: John, 77, has been sent to AandE with his wife Brenda after a routine health screening revealed a potentially-deadly `Triple A - abdominal aortic aneurism - a dramatic swelling of the main artery that could burst at any moment, making him a `walking timebomb. The only option is major surgery. Meanwhile, 92-year-old widow Eileen has been brought into hospital after falling and spending the night on the floor.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a rainy day, Granny Sheep plays in the garden with Peppa and Suzy. They decide to play with cardboard boxes and build a hospital, a cookie factory, and a train station.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Piggy arrives in a new electric car. The family goes for a ride and are surprised when the car talks and sings.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The doctor teaches children what to do when there is an accident. A patient soon appears and they put into practise the new techniques they have learned.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Peppa gets shiny new red shoes and never, ever wants to take them off until its time to jump in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on Snowy Mountain learning how to ski. Their teacher, Madame Gazelle, is very good and was once a world champion, but in the end it is Mummy Pig who impresses everyone.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is looking forward to taking Peppa and George to visit a fish pond that he used to visit when he was a piglet. However, a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium. With all the different fish there, surely Peppa can find a new friend for Goldie?

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig is given a parking ticket, Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children - and that they get told off too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family win a trip to America to star in Super Potatos movie, `Vegetables in Space. Miss Rabbit flies them over and they land in New York only to meet a new Miss Rabbit who shows them around the city of New York. They go up the Empire State Building and see the lights in Times Square. Now they have to get to Hollywood.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are driving in their large campervan across America to get to Hollywood. They stop at a diner to ask for directions and meet another Miss Rabbit. She sings them some songs and cooks them some eggs, over easy, of course, then they go to a barn dance followed closely by watching a Monster Truck rally, expect lots of muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family continue driving across America to get to Hollywood. As they drive through the desert, they meet Mr. Buffalo and Mr. Bison who are doing road work just like Mr. Bull from back home. They meet another Miss Rabbit and fly over the Grand Canyon in a helicopter, white water raft through the rapids and discover a cave from 700AD.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family make it to Hollywood, but they need to find the movie studio where Super Potato and Hash Brown are making the film `Vegetables in Space. They get lost on the freeway, but another Miss Rabbit tells them to follow the stars, which turn out to be stars in the pavement.

programme.desc: Peppa and George love jumping in muddy puddles, even when its raining, but when George takes off his rain hat he catches a cold. After plenty of rest and some warm milk and honey, George begins to feel much better.

programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig take Peppa, George and all their friends on a boat trip to Pirate Island. On the island, Grandpa shows everyone how to use his metal detector to find treasure and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to the playground.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas car runs out of petrol, but Granddad Dogs garage is nearby, and with one call, Granddad Dog is on his way to help.

programme.desc: Peppas friend Pedro wears glasses, and Peppa thinks she might need them too, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its sports day at Peppas playgroup and lots of special events are due to take place.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Before bed, Peppa and George take a bath, brush their teeth and listen to Daddy Pig read them a story. Finally, theyre asleep and Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig can relax.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to go to her relaxation class, but relaxing proves more difficult than expected. However, thanks to Daddy Pigs bouncy castle, they all have fun in the end.

programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cats Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings theyve done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: America the Bountiful
programme.desc: A pear orchard owned by a Japanese American family whose founders were held captive in an internment camp during World War II; different ways that pears can be prepared.

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: Writers and historians give their own interpretations on the last days of Anne Boleyn. In 1536 she became the first queen in Britains history to be executed. The brutal speed of her downfall and the nature of the charges against her retain their power to shock. We know how Anne died, but the story of why she had to go and who authored her violent end has been the subject of fiery debate across six centuries.

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: In early 1945, US Marines invade Iwo Jima and face an appallingly bloody battle for control of the island, to the dismay of the public back home.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Outcast from the Egyptian royal family and knowing she had nothing to lose, the ruthless and ambitious Cleopatra set about seducing Romes greatest ruler, Julius Caesar.

programme.title: Ancient Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: The archaeologists continue their quest into ancient Egypt, looking to discover the true story behind a mass grave near Luxor containing the bones of nearly 60 people.

programme.desc: Kiss, an American rock band, performs their top tracks at the Nurburgring in Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Ziggy Marley - Live at the Filmore
programme.desc: The Fillmore Auditorium is a historic concert hall in San Francisco, California. Founded by Bill Graham, it was named after being located originally on the corners of Fillmore Street and Geary Boulevard.

programme.title: Celine Dion: Thats Just the Woman in Me
programme.desc: The singer performs some of her greatest hits and answers questions from VIP guests; Josh Groban and will.i.am are also scheduled to appear.

programme.title: Coldplay - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Michael Kiwanuka - Garorock Festival 2017
programme.desc: Watch Michael Kiwanukas performance at the Garorock Festival in 2017.

programme.title: Unplugged: Summer Solstice
programme.desc: Hearing the fourth live album, and the first in acoustic format, from the Norwegian band A-ha.

programme.title: Oasis: Live at Wembley Arena 2008
programme.desc: Filmed at Wembley Arena, London, this concert film gives all fans a spectacular live experience from start to finish.

programme.title: The Moody Blues - Days of Future Passed Live
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. An electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album.

programme.title: Paul McCartney: The Space Within Us
programme.desc: Paul McCartney performs Beatles hits and other songs in concert.

programme.title: Avril Lavigne: Live in Calgary
programme.desc: Avril Lavigne performs in Calgary in 2007 ahead of the release of her album "The Best Damn Thing."

programme.title: Beck -- Live in London 2014
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans an experience; Beck performs his hits including "Loser," "Wave," "Debra" and many more.

programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around peoples sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, Henry and Sam discover a collection of motorbikes on Bodmin Moor accumulated over 25 years. They snap up a Suzuki B120 but selling it on to Henrys mate means they hardly make any money on it. programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon returned to school and got a lucrative job. But, one of her men ended her life as this new chapter began.

programme.desc: Pepita Redhair, a 27-year-old Navajo woman, goes missing after her mother drops her off at her boyfriends house in Albuquerque, a city in New Mexico. The family takes matters into their own hands to find her, enlisting the help of a medicine man.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Christian Aguilar mysteriously vanishes from his university campus. Police are stumped, until some CCTV footage leads the case in a shocking new direction.

programme.title: The Detectives: My Killer Case
programme.desc: Disturbing crimes from across the UK are unpacked and retold in intimate detail through police files, CCTV footage and accounts from those who helped solve them.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When Alessia Mesquita reconnects with her childhood crush, Rashod Newton, the couple fall desperately in love. But the romance becomes overshadowed by Rashods unpredictable behaviour.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: India Mackey live streams her life for all to see, but behind her smile on camera, her relationship with her boyfriend Kevin Dixon is painful. A day after her 20th birthday, India sees Kevins true face.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, the body of a computer programmer is found submerged in a bathtub. Leads are scarce until detectives uncover a series of troubling voicemails.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Judge Robert Rinder examines a drive-by shooting in Birmingham which put gun crime at the centre of the political agenda, and a case of sexual assault in Wales.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Arkansas police stop a knifeman enraged over a midnight pot roast; in Delray Beach, Fla., officers must rescue two children teetering on a ledge with their mother who is high on drugs; in Utah, a trespasser attacks an officer with his own baton.

programme.title: Road Rage
programme.desc: A rage-fueled driver crashes into a building. Florida drivers face chaos on the roads. New Jersey drivers try to survive their commute. An angry man picks a fight with a scooter.

programme.title: Road Rage
programme.desc: Truckers fight off angry drivers. A boy fights for his life against an enraged motorist. A man uses pepper spray to calm a road-raging driver. A furious woman chases down another driver who she feels wronged her.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: The grave story of a woman who was set on fire in her own home and the hunt for the suspect, her brother. A series of thefts of laughing gas canisters from hospitals around the country lead to a police car pursuit.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Monsters can be found lurking behind any innocent smile and on any street corner in America. Never-before-seen-video footage stares straight into the eyes of these killers who hide in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: After years of searching for love, Doris thinks shes finally hit the jackpot with an old friend named Mark. However, there seems to be something dark taking hold of their marriage.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2014, graduate student Tequila Suter is stabbed to death in her suburban Buffalo home; investigators only hope of solving the case is to piece together a trail of CCTV across town and follow in the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.sub-title: Hes Dead, Thats How I Feel
programme.desc: In Fontana, California, a bizarre traffic accident takes the life of 18-year-old Cristian Dominguez Aguilar. With the driver vanished into thin air, police turn to surveillance video for answers, but the deeper they go, the more sinister things get.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The search for a missing college student hits dead ends, until the detectives find chilling surveillance footage revealing what happened to her.

programme.title: The Detectives: My Killer Case
programme.desc: Disturbing crimes from across the UK are unpacked and retold in intimate detail through police files, CCTV footage and accounts from those who helped solve them.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: The lives of a beautiful young family in Long Beach, New York, rip apart when five-year-old Audrey witnesses her mother, Diane, brutally stabbed to death. To Audreys horror, her mothers murderer is somebody very close to home.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Vincent Taylor is stuck in a controlling relationship with his Jekyll and Hyde wife. After a violent knife attack results in Vincents death, his wife claims she was the victim of an abusive relationship.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In Northern California, police find an accomplished US Forest Service worker executed beneath a mound of snow. A missing wallet and a pair of jumper cables send Greg Hagwood on a multi-state manhunt for a deranged killer who knows no bounds.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Examining a devastating murder case of a girl whose younger sister was also dying of terminal cancer, and a story about an unscrupulous gang of puppy traders who were selling sick and dying puppies.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy
programme.desc: Detective Jason Moran re-opens the case of serial killer John Wayne Gacy. The grieving family of Jimmy Haakenson, missing for 40 years, wonder if he was a victim.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People Magazine partner up to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history, bringing tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Judge Robert Rinder examines a drive-by shooting in Birmingham which put gun crime at the centre of the political agenda, and a case of sexual assault in Wales.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Divorced mum of four Krystal Humphus marries single dad Nathan Maddox; she is over the moon that shes found a man who loves kids as much as she does; little does she know, her dream of a big, blended family will soon turn into a nightmare.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Randy Fergusons life changes forever when he meets single mother, Angela Phillips. But the beautiful life they build together hides an ugly secret.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In May of 2013, 36-year-old Army veteran Maribel Ramos disappears from her Orange, California apartment without a trace. Suspecting foul play, investigators devise a unique surveillance strategy to track her down and uncover some disturbing evidence.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In Farmville, North Carolina, three family members working at a convenience store fall victim to the most cold-blooded crime the town has ever seen; detectives attempt to pick up the killers video trail and put an end to their bloody spree.

programme.desc: At the home of the Edinburgh International Festival. Violin virtuoso Nicola Benedetti performs alongside Grammy-winning jazz star Wynton Marsalis in front of a live audience.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One mans brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after its revealed hes a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Battle-scarred stuntman Colt Seavers springs back into action when a movie star suddenly disappears. As the mystery deepens, he soon finds himself ensnared in a sinister plot that pushes him to the edge of a fall more dangerous than any stunt.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5
programme.desc: In Rio de Janeiro, ex-con Dom Torretto and ex-cop Brian OConner join forces against a corrupt businessman who wants them both dead.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa

programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress, life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: One-hit wonder Jackie Moon uses the profits from his short-lived musical career to buy struggling American Basketball Association team the Flint Tropics and live out his dreams as coach and star player. However, when the ABA decide to merge with the NBA, only four of the ABAs teams can make the move into the more successful league.

programme.title: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: A writer is trying to fly from New York to Savannah, Georgia, where he is due to be married in two days time. However, the plane crashes during take-off and the writer inadvertently saves the life of one of his fellow passengers, a free-spirited woman. She then accompanies him as he tries to continue his journey by rental car, train and bus - but he is beset by one disaster after another.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Dumped and depressed, English rose Iris agrees to swap homes with similarly unlucky in love Californian Amanda for a much-needed break. Iris finds herself in a palatial Hollywood mansion while Amanda navigates the lanes of a picture-perfect English village. Soon enough, both lovelorn ladies bump into local lads perfect for a romantic pick-me-up.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willys life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officers unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lovers sex-change operation.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a desolate near future, vicious motorcycle gangs roam the wastelands attacking what is left of civilisation. With law and order in chaos, a tough police patrolman enforces a new kind of law - cold-blooded revenge - when his family is murdered by one of the gangs.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Mad Max 3: Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: A middle-aged man reaches breaking point while gridlocked in Los Angeles traffic on a sweltering day. He abandons his car and embarks on a violent spree across town, increasing his arsenal of weapons after each confrontation. A detective who is working his last day with the LAPD before retiring begins receiving reports of the various incidents - and eventually realises that one man links them all.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: The Firm

programme.title: Super-Charlie

Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl, Queen Victoria and the Big Friendly Giant must devise a plan to get rid of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater and all the other bad giants once and for all.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the End of the Rainy Season
programme.desc: It is the end of the rainy season and Patsy the porcupine will soon be arriving to tidy up the savannah. The animals are busy having a clearout, except for Herbert the warthog who cannot bring himself to throw anything away. When he cannot find his musical rocks for the concert that night he is encouraged by Doris the duck to have a clearout.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Flamingo Festival
programme.desc: Pauline the pelican is looking forward to the Flamingo Festival on Waterlily Lake and excited to hear that Isobel is this years Flamingo Queen. She loves to watch the flamingoes practising their dance, and secretly copies their moves. When Isobel hurts herself, everybody is worried that the Flamingo Festival will have to be cancelled. That is, until a surprising understudy steps in to take Isobels place.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Whale Trip
programme.desc: The puffins of Mossy Bay are excited to be going on a whale trip with Hercule Moustache. Hercule points out all manner of sights and sounds as they ride on Thelma the whale, but the boisterous puffins dont always listen to Hercule, and frequently interrupt the poor walrus. The puffins soon learn how important it is to listen to your elders when out on a trip.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Jimjameree Tree
programme.desc: Joey the kangaroo and his friends all love to play by the jimjamaree tree. They are devastated when the tree is struck by lightning in a big storm. Together with Wally Two Trees they do everything they can to ensure their favourite tree comes back to life, with magical results.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.desc: Joey the kangaroo and his friend love playing boomerang ball together. However when their mums fall out they are no longer allowed to play with each other. Can the friends work together to reconcile their mums so that they can play again?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Zeds Really Helpful Mood
programme.desc: Zed the zebra decides to help all of his friends on the savannah. However, he does not always listen to them, and tries to help them in the way that he sees fit. Unfortunately, he ends up being more of a hindrance than a help.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.title: Clifford

programme.title: Clifford

programme.title: Clifford

programme.title: Clifford

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Madame Au Lait is called away to give Chikidee her ping pong lesson, Tommy and Tallulah bake a massive sticky carroty cake on their own. Ignoring the recipe, they make so much mixture that the oven explodes when they try to cook it, showering the whole town with sticky gunk and bringing Pufferty to a standstill! The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. They dont realise, until its too late, that Chikidee cant control it and has no idea how to land! Chime Time is imminent but they cant leave their friend adrift in the sky. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. While she is out buying the ingredients, the twins go polish crazy, thinking that the more they use the happier Madame Au Lait will be and the more trifle she will make. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to collect McCogginss bell for a town performance. Despite Battersbys warning that the clapper is fragile and doesnt have a spare, Tommy and Tallulah manage to break it. Deciding that they must make a replacement, they look everywhere for something to use and try some very unusual options. Will the bell be ready for Chime Time?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Tommy and Tallulah agree to babysit the spring chicks while Madame Au Lait tends to Mother Chicks hurt wing, they dont realise that how much of a handful the chicks will be. The twins are also taking part in the town kite display today, but somehow the chicks end up surfing on their kite, high in the sky! The twins must stage an airborne rescue before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! The twins chase the spring all over town as it bounces around causing chaos, eventually ending up attaching Pufferty to his kennel. Every time he tries to go somewhere, the spring pulls him back.

programme.desc: An attempted coup at Malagasy leaves lemur Indiana feeling frozen out. New marmoset Amy needs a family, but will the whole household accept her?

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the unique ecosystems of islands - the wild laboratories of mother nature. Travel from Canadas Arctic Baffin Island to Vancouver Island, as well as the tropical paradises of Borneo, Sri Lanka, and Australian KGari.

programme.title: Arctic From Above
programme.desc: Join Liz Bonnin as she discovers how plastic pollution is affecting seabirds, encounters a bison and learns how climate change is impacting bears and beavers.

programme.title: Brazil Untamed
programme.desc: Numerous species, including giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rhea, flock to the grasslands of the Pantanal during the dry season.

programme.title: Gangs Of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: As lockdown begins to ease, people start to return to Victoria Falls, and the Zambia gang have plenty of opportunity to perfect their ambushing techniques.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The team prepare to release two beautiful and elusive spotted cats called servals. The plan goes awry when one escapes into the dangerous city of Lilongwe. Meanwhile, its all hands on deck when a baby monkey arrives in a critical condition.

programme.title: Primeval

She is annoyed by the way Dorien continues entertaining her gentlemen callers and is irritated by the fact that Sharon is not bringing in a living wage - so she throws them both out. Holed up back in Sharons old bedsit, the two of them decide to join forces and take a united stand - but can they?

programme.title: Duty Free
programme.desc: David is caught out when Amy tells him that Tommy Wright has been dead for three years.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs
programme.desc: Its November 1907 and, following Emily the maids suicide, Mrs Bridges has begun to act rather strangely. She finally breaks down, stealing a baby on the eve of an important dinner party, and its up to the toffs and Hudson to save the day - after all, good cooks are hard to come by.

programme.title: Bread

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take on the challenge of making an ordinary second-hand car lap the test track as fast as a brand new, purpose-built sports saloon. Also, James travels to the frozen north to discover why the Finns are such good racing drivers. Meanwhile, Richard hammers around the track in the outlandish Veritas sports car and Mark Wahlberg is the Hollywood Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three presenters are challenged to drive from the heart of Switzerland to the north-western coast of England on just one tank of fuel. As an incentive, the first one to arrive gets to turn on the Blackpool Illuminations. Back at the track, James May tackles his first-ever power test in the Pagani Zonda F Roadster and, after years of waiting, The Sting gets to set a lap time in the Bugatti Veyron.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Magnificent bridges that time forgot: Goat Canyon Trestle in California was destroyed by a hurricane, while Kinzua Viaduct was destroyed by a tornado.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Once-great triumphs of marine engineering now left to rust include a ship graveyard in Maryland colonised by wildlife, and a Cold War sub.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Disused structures that were once at the forefront of power supply, including Kelenfold Power Station in Budapest and Wardenclyffe Tower in New York.

programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Midwife Linda Abbott returns to Leeds General. A year after retiring she realised she missed working at the hospital. Two dads with extremely different bedside manners are in the maternity wards in this episode. Joel dotes on his wife Rachel and wants there just to be the two of them in the delivery room. Dan, meanwhile, prefers digs towards his partner Kerry.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Theres a nationwide baby-boom in September and the midwives at the Leeds General Infirmary are run off their feet. When their unit is full they often send the overspill to St Jamess Hospital across the city and vice versa, which means a last-minute change in birth plans for some mums, including Natalie, Kate, and Rachel.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: The end of Sydneys Lockout Laws spells chaos for the Emergency Department. In the Intensive Care Ward, a diabetic patient refuses life-saving treatment and then suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Extreme Love
programme.desc: Louis travels to Phoenix, Arizona - the capital of dementia care. He spends time at Beatitudes, a residential institution, and also with those looking after loved ones at home to try to understand the struggle of living in a world of encroaching shadows - and of keeping relationships alive in circumstances that can be among the strangest and most challenging imaginable.

programme.desc: A look at how families cope with a loved ones behaviour disorder or mental illness.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Guided by his Bradshaws 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, Michael Portillo embarks on a classic rail journey from Amritsar to Shimla. Along the way he helps to feed the thousands at the worlds largest free kitchen and travels the railway routes used by millions of migrants during Partition. He gives his trademark colourful wardrobe an Indian twist.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael embarks on a rail journey from the Thar Desert in Rajasthan to the Indian capital, taking in desert landscapes and dazzling historic palaces. From Jodhpur, Michael strikes out into the desert, taking a camel ride to a village where life has changed little in centuries, before embarking on the Jaipur-Agra-Delhi `Golden Triangle tour, Indias must-do itinerary in 1913 as today.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is reunited with the vehicle he took his driving test in, a 1957 Ford 100E Estate. Meanwhile, Paul heads north to collect a 50-year-old MGBGT that still smells like a new car.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks search for the unusual lands him a 1947 Lea Francis thats half-made of wood. Paul heads for the countryside to pick up a Morris one tonne truck.

programme.title: Nuremberg: Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: In November 1945 the world watched as 21 Nazis went on trial for their crimes. Why did Albert Speer break ranks with his fellow defendants and how did he evade the death penalty?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to the historic Abbey Pumping Station in Leicester. Expert Ronnie Archer-Morgan swoons over some 1960s steel sculptures, books specialist Rupert Powell meets playwright Joe Ortons sister who brings in his typewriter, and Amin Jaffer discovers a valuable collection of exotic metal boxes.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Newcastles Civic Centre. Adam Schoon values a childs penny-farthing cycle, and some rare diaries tell the incredible story of Victorian heroine Grace Darling and her mission to save lives at sea.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Guided by his Bradshaws 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, Michael Portillo embarks on a classic rail journey from Amritsar to Shimla. Along the way he helps to feed the thousands at the worlds largest free kitchen and travels the railway routes used by millions of migrants during Partition. He gives his trademark colourful wardrobe an Indian twist.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael embarks on a rail journey from the Thar Desert in Rajasthan to the Indian capital, taking in desert landscapes and dazzling historic palaces. From Jodhpur, Michael strikes out into the desert, taking a camel ride to a village where life has changed little in centuries, before embarking on the Jaipur-Agra-Delhi `Golden Triangle tour, Indias must-do itinerary in 1913 as today.

programme.title: Hichki
programme.desc: After several interviews and numerous rejections, a woman who has Tourettes syndrome lands a job as a teacher at an elite school. She soon tries to do whatever she can to make her rebellious and troublemaking students realise their full potential.

programme.desc: Inspired by the real life of the coach and manager of the Indian national football team, Syed Abdul Rahim, who is also considered the architect of Indian football.

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: An eight-year-old boy makes a vow to his father that he will keep his family together no matter what happens, a promise that he works hard to keep over the next 60 years of his life.

programme.title: Loafer
programme.desc: Ravi Kumar is clearly the black sheep of the Kumar family. He is unemployed, uncouth, and gets into fist fights and trouble all the time. When a man is killed, the evidence points towards Ravi and he is arrested.

programme.title: Socha Na Tha
programme.desc: Mr. Oberoi wants his younger son to settle down with a wife, but Viren dreams of true love, and sets out to find the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Ishwar Chandra Thakur is living the good life, content with his loving wife Sumitra and son Adiya. There is but one thing which gradually comes to annoy Ishwar: his sons laziness and dependency on his father. When Adiya marries his fathers enemys daughter and gets her pregnant, Ishwar decides to teach his son a lesson in the poverty that he himself experienced and fought himself out of.

programme.title: Raanjhanaa
programme.desc: The story of Kundan and his journey from a 13 year old boy in love who goes on to become a committed and spirited young man, whose experiences in life made him the person he is today.

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: Madhu and Parthavis love rises above social status, but their families oppose.

programme.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
programme.desc: Set in the small-town of Bareilly, Bitti is a free-spirited young girl who lives life on her own terms and refuses to be pressured into getting married. Her life takes a shift when she meets Chirag Dubey and Pritam Vidrohi.

programme.title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: A woman leaves her husband on the first day of their marriage after discovering that he doesnt have a toilet. He desperately sets out on a mission to win back his love by standing up to the age-old traditions and values of India.

programme.title: Tadka
programme.desc: Seasoned with the right amount of spice and oodles of cuteness, an unintended romance unfolds between a radio jockey and a middle-aged archaeologist, with food playing Cupid.

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
programme.desc: Sintu, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrikas home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrikas approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Anu, a kind 20-year-old, and Aryavardhan, a resolute 45-year-old businessman, defy societal norms and family resistance, overcoming struggles to demonstrate that love transcends age or boundaries.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: Ganga Mai is a resilient woman who is deserted by her husband for not giving birth to a son. Refusing to bow to societal expectations, she devotes herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai, where she battles all odds, reunites with her family, and fights to get her mother her rightful place in the family while chasing her dreams.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family; while she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husbands dreams.
